description: Modularize oversized detector classes - split js-call-detector.ts (73 elements) and breaking-change-detector.ts (70 elements) into focused modules
goal: Improve maintainability and testability by splitting monolithic detector files into focused, single-responsibility modules
requirements: Split js-call-detector.ts into parser, visitor, and analyzer modules
Split breaking-change-detector.ts into diff-analyzer, impact-assessor, and signature-comparator modules
Create index.ts public API for each module
Maintain backward compatibility with existing exports

success_criteria.completion: Both detector files refactored into modular structure
success_criteria.quality: No regression in test coverage, cleaner architecture
